message:
fix(install): write Codex TOML config with stdio/command instead of HTTP URL (#39)

setup_single_toml_config() was writing url-based HTTP config entries for
Codex CLI's ~/.codex/config.toml, but current Codex CLI uses stdio
transport with command/args entries. This caused Codex to try connecting
to http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp/ at startup instead of launching the
binary directly.

Now writes command + args keys, removes stale HTTP-oriented keys (url,
http_headers, startup_timeout_sec, bearer_token_env_var) when migrating
existing configs, and correctly resolves the binary path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
